description: Public example outreach playbook for CareerReach AI.

outreach_rules.opening_template: Hello, this message was generated by my {agent_name} based on your JD ({focus_label}) and my resume evidence; {score_phrase}
outreach_rules.internship_intro: I am interested in AI product roles and would like to discuss whether my background fits your team's current needs.
outreach_rules.closing: I would appreciate the chance to talk further. Thank you!
outreach_rules.high_score_template: {agent_name} estimates my fit for this role at {score}/100.
outreach_rules.low_score_phrase: CareerReach Agent considers my fit for this role relatively strong.
outreach_rules.focus_label_rule: Use the JD term that best matches the resume evidence. Do not invent a focus label that is absent from the JD.

core_points.label: AI customer-service product experience
core_points.default_text: I have experience in AI customer-service product analysis, scenario definition, and workflow design.
core_points.expanded_text: I have worked on enterprise AI customer-service scenarios, including intent analysis, workflow design, missing-field follow-up, user confirmation, and human-review handoff.

core_points.label: Dify workflow
core_points.default_text: I have built Dify workflows for research-report generation and structured analysis.
core_points.expanded_text: I have built multi-node Dify workflows covering Excel parsing, evidence normalization, analysis matrix, insight generation, QA, and PPT rendering.

core_points.label: Agent building
core_points.default_text: I have built a local CareerReach AI system with Data/Communication agents, CLI tools, and RAG memory.
core_points.expanded_text: I have built a CareerReach AI system that uses a Data Agent for evidence collection, a Communication Agent for outreach planning, and ChromaDB/RAG for resume, JD, and playbook memory.

core_points.label: Vibe coding
core_points.default_text: I use AI coding tools to break down requirements, build workflows, and package local tools.
core_points.expanded_text: I use AI coding tools to turn product workflows into local scripts, reusable skills, and tested CLI capabilities.

core_points.label: English background
core_points.default_text: I can read English technical materials and communicate in English at work.
core_points.expanded_text: I can follow English product, technical, and market materials, which helps in global research and cross-team communication.

core_points.label: AI technical understanding
core_points.default_text: I understand model capabilities, evaluation metrics, technical boundaries, and product implementation trade-offs.
core_points.expanded_text: I understand model capabilities, evaluation metrics, technical boundaries, and data/effect evaluation issues in AI product implementation.

supplemental_points.label: User psychology and emotion insight
supplemental_points.default_text: I have experience translating user emotion and behavioral cues into AI customer-service emotion recognition design.

supplemental_points.label: Social media and community operations
supplemental_points.default_text: I have experience growing social media accounts and managing user communities, connecting content operations with conversion goals.
